-----
agent: Instructions Generator
-----
Take the information below and generate an agent instructions .md file for it in the /docs directory. If a .md filename is provided, use that, otherwise generate an appropriate filename based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and not tool long. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to reference to new docs file. If no information is provided below, prompt the user to give the necessary details about the layer of architecutr or codng standards to document.
